🕉 Know Him, Know the Festival

About Ganesha & the Festival

🐘

Lord Ganesha

Lord Ganesha is revered as the God of Wisdom, Prosperity, Success, and New Beginnings. He is worshipped before starting any important work and is known as the Remover of Obstacles (Vighnaharta). Millions of devotees seek His blessings for happiness, peace, and prosperity.

🪔

Ganesh Chaturthi

Also known as Vinayaka Chaturthi, Vinayaka Chavithi, or Vinayagar Chaturthi, this festival is celebrated by installing beautifully crafted Ganesha idols in homes and public pandals — with daily poojas, flowers, modaks, bhajans and cultural events, concluding with Ganesh Visarjan, symbolizing His return to His divine abode.

🗓 Mark Your Calendar

❤️ Our Mission

  • Promote devotion to Lord Ganesha
  • Unite the community
  • Encourage eco-friendly celebrations
  • Preserve Indian culture and traditions
  • Inspire youth through service
  • Organize social and spiritual activities

🌱 Eco-Friendly Ganesh

  • Using eco-friendly clay idols
  • Avoiding plastic decorations
  • Conserving water
  • Planting trees
  • Keeping our surroundings clean
